violations.text: -Prep unit was observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit (repeat violation). -Open Air case was leaking. Per PIC, work order in place for evaporation pump (new violation). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

Sink and surface sanitizer is not dispensing chemical at proper concentration. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Establishment will be using quaternary ammonium sanitizing tablets. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025
Proper airgap lacking on beverage drip tray discharge pipes. Pipe currently has an air break. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and service area were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The Sink and Surface sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink was observed at 0 DDBSA. Establishment will use quaternary ammonium sanitizing tablets. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Various foods in open air case was observed held at 45-52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods that were recently stocked were placed into walk-in cooler to chill. Foods that were out of temperature for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed of. See disposal list. Unit was taken out of service to hold foods that require refrigeration for food safety. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Hot foods for grab and go packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The cutting boards on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

-Prep unit was observed at 45 degrees Fahreheit. -Open Air case was observed at ranging ambient temperatures of 39-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
-Gaskets for reach in freezer were observed in poor repair. -Cap cover for beverage slide was observed held together by duct tape. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sink and surface sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the fanguards in the walk-in cooler and shelving in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
Proper airgap lacking on beverage drip tray discharge pipes. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
Refuse area was observed with an accumulation of litter and accumulated foliage. Area to be maintained cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The electrical room has an accumulation of soil residue and small amounts of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
